name: RPlog_Enter_Corellia
title: Enter Corellia
summary: Disguised as a freighter crew, a New Republic infiltration party slips into the seedy Bottom's End district of Coronet City on Imperial-held Corellia: the wary medic Myiari, the calm Caspian-trained soldier Rasi posing as a CSA corporate rep, and Senator Tokoga, a Mon Calamari whose famous face makes him the likeliest to be recognized. As they banter over disguises and the dangers of being identified, Rasi gets his spotless boots splashed with mud by a departing airspeeder, drawing him into conversation with a swaggering lethan Twi'lek named Raynn who has just concluded a brief, cryptic meeting and credit-chip exchange. At a roadside food shack the group trades small talk with Raynn about Nar Shaddaa, the Hutts, and the violent powers that supplanted them, each feeling the others out. Myiari, increasingly irritable and underpaid, snipes at Rasi for blowing their low profile before excusing herself to chase down power coils for the ship. The exchange ends with cautious, mutual sizing-up, the Republic agents and the enigmatic Raynn parting on cordial but guarded terms in the crowded, unfriendly streets of occupied Corellia.
